data.title: Decide whether to delegate issue to Claude or Codex
data.description:
@Linear said in [SKO-172](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-172/feat-skills-shared-agent-skills-registry#comment-766458bc):

> I can update this issue to reflect:
>
> * keep shared skills in `.skogai/skills`
> * symlink to `.claude/skills` when needed
> * use `skogai/marketplace` for cross-project skills
> * drop the registry work
>
> I can only delegate this issue to one agent at a time. Which should I use: Claude or Codex?
